narrative: Strait of Hormuz supply disruptions introduce a geopolitical risk premium as Treasury Secretary Bessent warns of a 10 million barrel oil deficit — gold lower -1.22% near $4,588; equities +0.14%; DXY +0.13%; VIX 17.2. USD/JPY holds at 157.03 as the +300bp Fed-BoJ carry advantage offsets regional tension. EUR/USD steady at 1.1718, capped by the 175bp Fed-ECB differential. Watch RBA Rate Decision at 04:30 UTC tomorrow.
